message: Jake
Tony
Jennifer
Fabar
Kristy
Hello
Did you come with Yuriko today?
Yeah, after all, she's kind of my secretary assistant.
Huh.
Yeah, right.
Don't you like it?
What are you talking about? There's no need to overthink it.

Film industry personnel are gathered. It seems they can't fully enjoy themselves since the shoot has been halted.
As the sun sets, the scenery dyed in crimson is beautiful. Leaving the curtains open was a good call.
They lift their glasses to their mouths with expressions as if nothing happened, chatting with the guests next to them.
Though they seem to be pretending to enjoy conversations, their minds are...
It doesn't seem like she's absorbed in the conversation.
She looks down, trying not to meet my gaze. It feels like there's something she feels guilty about regarding me.
She has a gloomy face, completely different from when she was talking to the director.
She seems surprised, but her expression is cold and stiff. Given that she saw something like that right in front of her, she is surprisingly calm.
With a cold expression, her eyes are fixed on the floor. Why won't she look me in the face?
I thought you wouldn't come today.
I'm not so busy that I can refuse the director's invitation.
Yeah, that's true.
Um,
No, it's nothing.
What's going on with Meryl?
It's embarrassing to show such disgrace.
She has her own issues.
Even so, she shouldn't have done something like that.
It's not like her at all; what happened?
Is she gossiping again?
No, I don't think that's the case.
Then stop talking about him.
If it weren't for this setting, I wouldn't even want to get close.
I have nothing to talk about regarding that.
Have you resolved your bad relationship?
I don't think that's ever going to happen. I'm not the kind of person who can let strange rumors slide.
I don't know anything about it,
at all.
The director is very tired. I'm trying to cheer him up by being someone to talk to.
Is that so?
You have it tough, huh?
Tough? Not at all. It's fun talking to him.
Anyway, right now I want to lift the director’s spirits.
I want to be by the director's side as much as possible. He's feeling down about Meryl.
It's understandable, nobody wants to see a situation like that.
Yeah.
This just makes me feel worse. Poor thing.
I'm glad Gai came back. Congratulations.
That's.
what you should tell her. She had a tough time.
Right. You're absolutely right.
Make sure to say congratulations to her.
Gai had a tough time too, didn't he? With Meryl going through all that. But,
I wonder why it was Gai.
Does that mean there was a chance he could attack someone else?
Not really.
Such things.
Anyway, I'm glad it didn't lead to anything serious.
It's good to see you feeling well too. Seems like Gai coming back makes you happy.
Aren't you happy too?
Well, I...
I don't know.
I'm envious.
You're happy, aren't you,
San?
She was amazing, stepping in between Meryl and Gai like that. I don't have that kind of courage.
She must have acted on instinct. For the one she loves.
For the one she loves, huh?
I wonder if I could do something like that?
You must really love him to have that kind of courage.
What do you think made Meryl do that?
Why do you ask?
Do you think something happened between Gai and Meryl?
Or did she just mistake him for someone else?
Meryl's done for. Doing something like that.
I heard in the news that Cindy might have been killed by that criminal too.
Ah, the truth is still unknown, though.
Poor Cindy.
How could such a cute daughter end up in such a situation?
You have to catch the perpetrator for Cindy's sake. It's your job, right?
I wonder if Meryl's involvement is related to this incident? There was also a time when it was said that Guy was the culprit.
Don't you know anything?
As for this murder case, I don’t know anything.
If possible, I’d like to forget about it.
Is this yours?
No. But it's a strangely shaped key.
I picked it up earlier, so I think it belongs to someone here.
I've never seen anything like this before. It's definitely not mine.
I’m sorry, but I think it’s better to ask someone else.
※※※ It’s a bug ※※※
